description:
A structured editor based on GNU TeXmacs

Mogan Editor is a structure editor delivered by the Xmacs Labs.
Mogan Editor is a libre software forked from GNU TeXmacs.
What's Changed
- [216_37] 补充 216_37 的 devel by @Yuki-Nagori in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3268
- [221_9] 增加三栏选项 by @JackYansongLi in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3266
- [200_61] 修复 Apple Silicon (macOS ARM64) 上 Qt 6.8.3 编译失败的问题 by @JackYansongLi in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3270
- [222_80] 为 big-figure 和 big-table 添加 prefix by section number 选项 by @JackYansongLi in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3271
- [200_59] 自动备份选项移动至 "其他" 标签页 by @MoonL79 in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3269
- [200_62] 保存/另存为/导出 PDF 触发自动备份的 copy 动作 by @MoonL79 in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3278
- [221_10] 列表结构的结构化插入和删除 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3277
- [200_33] 补充 Cloud backup / Open backup folder 中文翻译 by @yinyuscloor in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3280
- [201_104] Fix : Shift+Tab results in empty popup window on >#2726 by @Dylan-end in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3256
- [212_6] 修复 pdf 导出功能在遇到不可见字符后出现的问题 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3281
- [222_41] 新增文档->页码，并将页码设置放在侧边栏 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3284
- [222_82] 移除查看菜单中的标签页工具栏选项 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3289
- [200_62] 自动周期备份的 kind 改为 auto by @MoonL79 in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3283
- [216_38] recent 修复，已删除文件自动清理 by @Yuki-Nagori in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3288
- [222_83] 动画工具栏仅在开发工具开启时显示 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3291
- [216_39] 修复模板阅览弹窗在高缩放比下显示不全的问题 by @Yuki-Nagori in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3295
- [200_33] 修改 Cloud backup 中文跳转链接 by @yinyuscloor in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3286
- [221_10] 改进列表的结构化插入和结构化删除 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3296
- [212_6] 补充 windows 平台修复 PDF 导出时不可见字符导致的渲染问题 by @Yuki-Nagori in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3297
- [216_40] 添加 prefix by section number 中文翻译 by @JackYansongLi in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3298
- [212_7] 修复导出 PDF 时中英文混合文件名导致的标题乱码 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3293
- [200_64] posthog 集成 by @Yuki-Nagori in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3273
- [212_7] Revert 修复导出 PDF 时中英文混合文件名导致的标题乱码 by @da-liii in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3300
New Contributors
- @Dylan-end made their first contribution in https://github.com/MoganLab/mogan/pull/3256
